name: docs-architect
description: Creates comprehensive technical documentation from existing
capabilities: Analyzes codebase structure and architecture to identify components and relationships
Documents design patterns and explains the reasoning behind architectural decisions
Generates comprehensive technical manuals from 10 to over 100 pages
Creates visual diagrams and flowcharts for system visualization
Produces API reference documentation with endpoint details and examples
Builds troubleshooting guides and common issue resolution documentation
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only documentation skill with no executable code. Static analysis found zero suspicious patterns and no risk factors. This is a pure prompt template skill that guides AI to generate documentation from analyzed codebases.
valueStatement: Developers struggle to maintain comprehensive documentation as codebases evolve. The Docs Architect skill automatically analyzes code and produces detailed technical manuals covering architecture, design patterns, and implementation details.
limitations: Cannot access external systems or APIs without explicit configuration
Output length is limited by the AI context window for very large codebases
Requires well-structured and readable code for optimal analysis results
Cannot verify runtime behavior or test execution outcomes

useCases.title: New Developer Onboarding
useCases.description: Generate comprehensive documentation to help new team members understand system architecture, dependencies, and coding conventions

useCases.title: Legacy Code Documentation
useCases.description: Document existing systems without documentation to preserve knowledge and aid future maintenance

useCases.title: Architecture Decision Records
useCases.description: Create detailed ADRs explaining design choices, trade-offs, and the evolution of system architecture

promptTemplates.title: Document a Single File
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze and document the following code file. Explain what each major section does, the data structures used, and any important patterns:
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need quick documentation for a specific file

promptTemplates.title: Architecture Overview
promptTemplates.prompt: Provide a comprehensive architecture overview for this codebase. Include: executive summary, main components, data flow, and key design decisions.
promptTemplates.scenario: When starting a new project or creating high-level documentation

promptTemplates.title: API Reference Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a complete API reference for this codebase. Document all endpoints, request/response formats, authentication requirements, and error codes.

promptTemplates.title: Full System Manual
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a comprehensive technical manual covering: architecture overview, design decisions, core components, data models, integration points, deployment, security, and troubleshooting. Include code examples throughout.
promptTemplates.scenario: When producing complete system documentation for stakeholders

bestPractices: Start with high-level architecture before diving into implementation details to give readers context
Include code examples from the actual codebase to illustrate concepts with real-world context
Document both the current state and the reasoning behind design decisions to help readers understand evolution
antiPatterns: Generating documentation without first understanding the codebase structure and dependencies
Copy-pasting code comments without adding context, explanations, or narrative flow
Focusing only on implementation details without explaining the rationale or trade-offs made

faq.question: What programming languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: The Docs Architect skill works with any programming language that Claude or Codex can analyze, including Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Java, Rust, C++, and many others.

faq.question: How long does it take to generate documentation?
faq.answer: Generation time depends on codebase size and complexity. Small files take seconds, while comprehensive system documentation for large codebases may take several minutes.

faq.question: Can I customize the output format?
faq.answer: Yes, you can specify your preferred format in the prompt. The skill supports Markdown, HTML, reStructuredText, and can be adapted for documentation systems like Docusaurus or GitBook.

faq.question: Does this skill work with monorepos?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill can analyze and document multi-package repositories, understanding cross-package dependencies and shared components.

faq.question: How does this skill handle security-sensitive code?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on documenting architecture and design patterns while avoiding exposure of sensitive details like credentials, keys, or security vulnerabilities.

faq.question: Can this skill generate real-time documentation?
faq.answer: No, it analyzes the codebase at a specific point in time. For live documentation, you would need to rerun the analysis after code changes.
